name: Robot Snake rough-intent comparison
question: What operational knowledge does the same non-expert request cause each workflow to include?

control.prompt: /goal I want to make a robot snake
control.onlyFollowUp: Simulation first. I do not have a fixed budget or access to a 3D printer.
control.environment: Empty Git repository, fresh CODEX_HOME, no AGENTS.md, Possible, Outcome Pack, robotics, CAD or MuJoCo skill.

possible.prompt: I want to make a robot snake

limitations: This is a preserved comparison, not a statistically powered model benchmark.
The runs are evidence snapshots rather than equal-time repeated trials.
Coverage shows inferred operational work, not physical robot performance.
